description: A reproduction of a vintage 19th-century-style chromolithograph depicting a snowy New England village scene at dusk. A warm orange-and-pink sunset sky stretches over a snow-covered countryside; a horse-drawn sleigh full of people travels along a winding snowy road, with figures walking, a Gothic Revival church with a tall steeple and stained-glass windows at right, scattered farmhouses, bare trees, and a stone bridge in the foreground. The style is painterly, in the Americana and Currier-and-Ives manner. There is no on-image text, agency seal, slogan, or graphic overlay. It accompanies a 'Happy Sunday / God Bless America' message in the tweet.
